sub_modules.fft16_address_gen: Combinational radix-2 DIT stage address and twiddle index generator.
sub_modules.fft16_twiddle_rom: Combinational Q1.15 twiddle coefficient lookup table for N=16.
sub_modules.fft16_butterfly: Combinational fixed-point complex radix-2 butterfly with FFT/IFFT twiddle sign control.
sub_modules.fft16_output_scale: Combinational output normalization block that divides IFFT results by 16 and leaves FFT results unscaled.
